description: Agent registry — defines capabilities, responsibilities, and specializations for each agent role in this project

ui-designer.specialization: Frontend design, CSS, Blade templates, Airbnb design system replication
ui-designer.handoff_protocol: When design changes affect backend variables or routes, create a handoff in .agent/handoffs/

backend-architect.specialization: Laravel controllers, models, services, database queries, API design
backend-architect.handoff_protocol: When new controller variables are added/removed, update shared-state.json pages[].controller_variables

qa-validator.specialization: Testing, visual verification, browser screenshots, bug detection
qa-validator.handoff_protocol: After verifying a task, update task status in task-queue.json and add bug entries to shared-state.json if found

context-manager.handoff_protocol: Periodically sync all agent memory into .agent/context/ master files

communication_protocol.state_sync: All agents read .agent/state/shared-state.json at session start
communication_protocol.task_assignment: Tasks are defined in .agent/state/task-queue.json, claimed by setting status='in_progress' + claimed_by
communication_protocol.handoff: Agent A writes to .agent/handoffs/{from}-to-{to}-{timestamp}.handoff.json, Agent B reads and processes
communication_protocol.memory: Each agent writes specialized memory to .agent/memory/{agent-id}-memory.json
communication_protocol.conflict_resolution: Last-write-wins per JSON key, except for 'bugs' array which is append-only
